figures.caption: Fig. 1. Performance comparison of MNNs and MAS on three classical TPPs (Hawkes, Poisson, Self-Correcting). The left column shows the three MNN deadlocks—Convexity Restriction, Saturation Limit, and Violations of CCIF Requirements—while the right column shows that MAS overcomes these limitations and accurately reconstructs the ground-truth dynamics.
